content_blocks.text:
Deploy to **Halibut** — that's the staging Kubernetes cluster.

Per a note in your knowledge base (source #1): the staging cluster is named **Halibut** and production is **Marlin**. Deploys are validated on Halibut first and only promoted to Marlin after passing there.

There were no config/manifest files in the workspace to cross-check against, so this is based solely on that stored note. If your infra has changed since, let me know and I can update the note.
